outfit_info.outfit_description: A young boy sports a preppy casual look: a navy corduroy shirt over a striped tee. Dark blue trousers, cuffed to reveal a classic check, are paired with tan suede boots. The ensemble balances comfort with a refined, timeless appeal, ideal for daily wear.

model_attributes.body: Lean, youthful physique, exuding a calm and earnest demeanor, characteristic of a thoughtful young individual.
model_attributes.pose: Standing upright, hands relaxed; one rests on a chessboard. Model maintains a direct, steady gaze forward with poised confidence.
model_attributes.background: Rustic attic study, filled with bookshelves, taxidermy, a chessboard, and an older gentleman reading in an armchair.

outfit.P01135755: black cotton pants with check cuffs
